channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Wellness Influencer Dies One Day After 8th Wedding Anniversary Following Complications from IVF Procedure
item.description: Gabriela Martins Santos de Moura was reportedly in a coma for eight days before she died at age 31

item.title: Liza Minnelli on Addiction and 'Amazing' Life in Sobriety: ‘Somebody Said Try This — and So I Tried It’ (Exclusive)
item.description: "If I fell off the program ... I'd go right back in and fight again. Don't give up," the stage and screen icon says in an exclusive interview with PEO...

item.title: Flavor Flav Vows to Throw Parade for U.S. Women’s Hockey Team After Inviting Them to ‘Real Celebration’ for Olympics Victory
item.description: The rapper and women's sports hype man expanded his Las Vegas party plans for U.S. athletes

item.title: All About Jonathan Bailey and Simone Ashley's “Bridgerton” Return and Why They Weren't in Season 4 Part 1 (Exclusive)
item.description: Showrunner Jess Brownell breaks down their cameo (and part 1 absence) in a new interview

item.title: JoJo Siwa Speaks Out About Why She Wasn't Invited to Fellow “Dance Moms” Alum Brooke Hyland's Wedding
item.description: Hyland tied the knot with Brian Thalman on Feb. 21, in Fort Myers, Florida

item.title: John Stamos & Jodie Sweetin Dance to Taylor Swift in Sweet 'Full House' Reunion
item.description: John Stamos and Jodie Sweetin's "Full House" reunion was full of dancing ... with the two stars cutting a rug in a sweet vid. The stars of the hit com...

item.title: Mike White Shocks Fellow Castaways With Ripped Abs on 'Survivor 50' Premiere
item.description: Lookin' good, Mike White! "Survivor 50" boasts the largest cast of any season ... but Mike stood out right away, as competitors noticed his "bulging 6...

item.title: Cardi B Is Still Welcome at 'SNL' After Alleged Nicki Minaj Outburst on Set
item.description: Cardi B’s alleged backstage meltdown over a Nicki Minaj gag may have shaken the walls at 'SNL' ... but we're told there's no hard feelings! Sources cl...

item.title: 'Below Deck's Captain Sandy Yawn Confronts Accused Scam Builder in Court, On Video
item.description: Captain Sandy Yawn steered herself straight into a courtroom showdown ... accusing a contractor of pocketing millions of dollars from people like her ...

item.title: Katherine Short Changed Her Name to Katherine Hartley to Avoid Harassment
item.description: Katherine Short thought she'd feel safer as a social worker by putting distance between herself and her famous father ... filing a petition to change ...
